heading: Duty to maintain corporate and tax-exempt status
label: 70108 Duty to maintain corporate and tax-exempt status
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)70108(a)36:5608(e)., , §§ 1808(e), 1814 (related to duty to maintain status), , 2762.Sept. 23, 1996Pub. L. 104–201, title XVIII110 Stat. 276170108(b)36:5613 (related to duty to maintain status).In subsection (a), the words “organized and” and “the State of” are omitted as unnecessary.

children.heading: .—Corporate Status
children.label: a .—Corporate Status
children.text: The corporation shall maintain its status as a corporation incorporated under the laws of Pennsylvania.

children.heading: .—Tax-Exempt Status
children.label: b .—Tax-Exempt Status
children.text: The corporation shall maintain its status as an organization exempt from taxation under the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 ( et seq.).26 U.S.C. 1
